title: Self-Evo Document Package v0.1.1
description: Draft document-level governance corpus for bounded self-evolution of c = a + b systems. This safe-layout staging package includes Markdown sources, academic PDFs, review records, patch notes, and package-control artifacts. Not a conformance certificate, not deployment authorization, and not live self-evolution permission.
notes: Dual license: CC BY 4.0 for documentation/PDF/Markdown/review materials; MIT for machine-readable JSON/CSV/CFF/checksum and future schema/checker artifacts.
